args.text: Both auth-api (v5.8.4) and session-store (v2.2.9) confirmed patched.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body: auth-api (v5.8.4) and session-store (v2.2.9) are patched and verified. Credential rotation to follow.

args.text: Credentials rotated: refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, old keys confirmed rejected.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body: As part of remediating CVE-2026-30117, session signing keys have been rotated. All staff will need to sign in again.
